# @021.is/agent-docs — LLM usage

> Single-source-of-truth docs catalog: one object feeds a JSX page, a `.md` route, `/llms.txt`, and `/llms-full.txt`.

Install: bun add @021.is/agent-docs

## Imports
- `import { type DocsCatalog, h1, h2, p, code } from "@021.is/agent-docs"` — catalog type + section builders, markdown renderer, llms.txt builders
- `import { markdownRoute, llmsTxtRoute, llmsFullRoute } from "@021.is/agent-docs/next"` — Next.js GET handlers (peer: `next`)

## API
Root (`.`):
- `DocsCatalog` — `{ slug; title; description; body: DocsSection[]; meta? }`; `DocsSection` union; `SectionKind`/`HeadingLevel`/`CalloutTone` constant maps
- Section builders: `h1/h2/h3(text)`, `p(text)`, `ul(items)`, `ol(items)`, `code(language, source, filename?)`, `tabs(tabs, title?)`, `callout(tone, text)`
- `renderMarkdown(catalog)` — catalog → Markdown string
- `buildLlmsTxt(config)` — `/llms.txt` index string; `buildLlmsFullTxt(catalogs)` — all catalogs concatenated
- `LlmsTxtConfig` — `{ name; tagline; siteUrl; catalogs; extra?; openapi? }`

`./next` (each returns a `() => Response` GET handler):
- `markdownRoute(catalog)` — serve one catalog as `text/markdown`
- `llmsTxtRoute(config)` — serve `/llms.txt`; `llmsFullRoute(catalogs)` — serve `/llms-full.txt`

## Example
```ts
import { type DocsCatalog, h2, p, code } from "@021.is/agent-docs";

export const installCatalog: DocsCatalog = {
  slug: "install",
  title: "Install the SDK",
  description: "One package, two minutes to working sign-in.",
  body: [h2("Install"), p("Use your package manager."), code("bash", "bun add @021.is/my-sdk")],
};

// app/docs/install.md/route.ts
import { markdownRoute } from "@021.is/agent-docs/next";
export const GET = markdownRoute(installCatalog);
```

## Notes
- `next` is an optional peer dep, only needed for `./next`.
- Builders are pure/deterministic; one catalog is the single source for every doc surface.
